case_title: ON24, INC. VS. THE RTC GROUP, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-09-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $346.14 AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100030330) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030991)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030411) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100027486), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. SERVED MAR-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100027678) AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-09-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-08-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100030411) AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC. $16,518.00 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,888.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030411)
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE RTC GROUP, INC.
